product: Semantic metadata support for metric views
tagline: You can now define semantic metadata in a metric view.
what_it_does: You can now define semantic metadata in a metric view. Semantic metadata helps AI tools such as Genie Spaces and AI/BI dashboards interpret and use your data more effectively. To use semantic metadata, your metric view must use YAML specification version 1.1 or higher and run on Databricks Runtime 17.3 or above.
why_it_matters: Table like asset source Reference a table like asset using its three part name: YAML source: catalog.schema.source table SQL query source To use a SQL query, write the query text directly in the YAML: YAML source: SELECT FROM samples.tpch.orders o LEFT JOIN samples.tpch.customer c ON o.o custkey = c.c custkey note When using a SQL query as a source with a JOIN clause, set primary and foreign key constraints on underlying tables and use the RELY option for optimal query performance.

key_takeaway: You can now define semantic metadata in a metric view.
